name: Ard Ri
author: AGP (traditional Scottish tafl)
description: Ard Ri, the 7x7 Scottish tafl in the hnefatafl family. Asymmetric siege: a King on the central throne with 8 defenders clustered around him, against 16 attackers in four groups at the edge midpoints (attackers move first). All pieces move like a rook. Men are captured by custodial flanking and the King may assist; the King is captured by being surrounded on all four sides. The King wins by escaping to any edge square; the attackers win by capturing the King.
